use std::sync::Mutex;
use tokio::net::TcpListener;

async fn handle_connections(listener: TcpListener, state: Mutex<Vec<String>>) {
    loop {
        let (stream, _) = listener.accept().await.unwrap();
        let mut guard = state.lock().unwrap();
        guard.push(stream.peer_addr().unwrap().to_string());
        process_stream(stream).await;
    }
}

async fn process_stream(_stream: tokio::net::TcpStream) {}
